summary: Added a new proptest suite `scan_args_hardening` to `crates/tokmd/tests/properties.rs` to deterministically verify all input fuzzing invariants for `ScanArgs`, ensuring paths normalization, deterministic behavior, and redaction boundary adherence, bypassing `cargo fuzz` environmental link failures.
